zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Sarah Munce於1695年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭時，她的父親Thomas Munce36歲，母親Lucy42歲。她於1720年與Isaac Young Jr.在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1742年在美國喬治亞謝佛遜享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Sarah Munce于1695年出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭时，她的父亲Thomas Munce36岁，母亲Lucy42岁。她于1720年与Isaac Young Jr.在英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1742年在美国乔治亚州謝佛遜享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Munce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Muntz   or   Mantz  .

variants.name: Muntz
meanings: German (Müntz): habitational name from Müntz near Jülich.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Müntz): variant of Münz (see Munz 2).
German: variant of   Munz   1 and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Sarah Munce was born in 1695, in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Munce, was 36 and her mother, Lucy, was 42. She married Isaac Young Jr. in 1720, in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1742, in Jefferson, Georgia, United States, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Sarah Munce est née en 1695, à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Munce, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lucy, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Isaac Young Jr. en 1720, à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1742, à Jefferson, Géorgie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Sarah Munce 1695 in Ireland, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Munce 36 und ihre Mutter Lucy 42. Sie hat 1720 in Ireland, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom Isaac Young Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1742 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Jefferson, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Sarah Munce è nata il nel 1695 nel Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Munce, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lucy, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Isaac Young Jr. nel 1720, nel Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1742, nel Jefferson, Georgia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Sarah Munceが1695年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Munceは36歳，母Lucyは42歳であった。1720年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドでIsaac Young Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1742年にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ジェフエルソンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Sarah Munce(이)가 1695년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Munce(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1720년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에서 Isaac Young Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1742년 미국 조지아 주 제퍼슨에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Sarah Munce nasceu em 1695, em Ireland, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Munce, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lucy, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Isaac Young Jr. em 1720, em Ireland, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1742, em Jefferson, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Sarah Munce родилась в 1695 г. в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Munce было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Isaac Young Jr. в 1720 г. в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1742 г. в местности джеффирсон, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Sarah Munce nació en 1695, en Ireland, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Munce, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lucy, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Isaac Young Jr. en 1720, en Ireland, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1742, en Jefferson, Georgia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 47 años.
